tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Artist: The Pretenders
Song: I'll stand by you
Tab: Nick Lyons (nlyons83@hotmail.com) and Mike Danberg (msd10@yahoo.com)
This song has a lot of piano in it. I'll try to tab it as best I can hopefully it will sound close enough.

[Intro]
[ch]D[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch] (not positive about this)
Oh, why look so sad[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]
Tears are in your eyes[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]A[/ch] - [ch]G[/ch] (slide barred chord)
Come on and come to me now[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]
Don't be ashamed to cry[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G[/ch]
Let me see you through[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]A[/ch] - [ch]G[/ch]
Cause i've seen the darkside too[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab] [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]Em[/ch]
When the night falls on you[/tab]
[tab] [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]
Don't know what to do[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]
Nothing you confess[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]
Can make me love you less[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                   [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]
I'll stand by you, I'll stand by you[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Am[/ch]
Won't let nobody hurt you[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]
I'll stand by you[/tab]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]A[/ch]
So if you're mad get mad[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]G[/ch]
Don't hold it all inside[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]A[/ch] - [ch]G[/ch]
Come on and talk to me now[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]
Hey what you got to hide[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]
I get angry too[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]A[/ch] - [ch]G[/ch]
Well I'm alive like you[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                              [ch]C[/ch]
When you're standing at the crossroads[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]
Don't know which path to choose[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]
Let me come along[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]A[/ch]
Cause even if you're wrong[/tab]

[Chorus] (same)

[tab][Solo] (over verse riff)
(key of [ch]D[/ch])
e|----------------------------------------------------------|
B|-7-5-5-7-5-8P7-5-7-5--7-5-5-7-5-8P7-5-7-5-----------7P5---|
G|-------------------------------------------7-5-7-5------7-|
D|----------------------------------------------------------|
A|----------------------------------------------------------|
E|----------------------------------------------------------|[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]Em[/ch]
And when when the night falls on you baby[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]
You're feeling all alone[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]
Won't on your own[/tab]

chorus repeats over and over first 3 then 4 over and over til end.
At 3:10 the riff playing til the end of the song is just the solo
